sentences.english: My favorite country is Australia.
I've been there and I absolutely loved it.
The people are so friendly and welcoming.
I stayed in Melbourne, which is a vibrant city with lots of culture, good food, and great weather.
sentences.korean: 멜번에 머물렀는데, 문화가 풍부하고 음식이 맛있고 날씨 좋은 활기찬 도시예요.

sentences.english: The beaches are beautiful too.

sentences.english: I could live there.
New Zealand is my favorite country.
I went there for a vacation and I was blown away by the natural beauty.
The mountains, the fjords, the forests — everything is stunning.
The people are really nice too.

sentences.english: Very laid-back and friendly.
I would definitely go back.
I'd say Hungary. I went to Budapest and had an amazing time.

sentences.english: The architecture is beautiful, the food is delicious, and it's very affordable.

sentences.english: The thermal baths are incredible — you can relax in these ancient hot springs while enjoying the city views.

sentences.english: Thailand is my favorite.
I went there a few years ago and had the best time.

sentences.english: The culture is fascinating, the food is phenomenal, and it's very affordable.
The people are incredibly kind and welcoming.
Bangkok is chaotic but exciting, and then you have these quiet, peaceful islands.

sentences.english: Lebanon is my favorite country because it's my home country.
But if I'm talking about another country, I really love Lebanon because of the food, the culture, and the hospitality of the people.
I encourage everyone to visit because it's a beautiful place.
My favorite country is France.
I love the culture, the food, the wine.
Paris is beautiful, but I also love the countryside — the vineyards, the lavender fields.
The French people can be a bit standoffish, but once you get to know them, they're wonderful.
